name: Swami Medhananda
core_thesis: Article-backed thinker stub created during primitives_v2 Phase 2 from `data/articles/source/medhananda.md`.

cross_engagements.brief: Abhinavagupta presses the same epistemic authority axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `scripture-plus-transformative-experience` rather than `comparative-theological-reading`.
Akshapada Gautama presses the same method axis in the methodological register, but with the value `formal-proof-or-inference` rather than `comparative-reading`.
Adi Sankara presses the same truth-structure axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `hierarchical-standpoint-truth` rather than `context-indexed-without-final-hierarchy`.
Baladeva Vidyabhushana presses the same perspectivism axis in the epistemological register, but with the value `partial-perspectives-ranked` rather than `irreducible-true-perspectives`.

engaged_works.title: Sri Aurobindo and Indian Philosophy (essays)
engaged_works.ascription_notes: Securely authored modern monograph; bibliographic ascription is uncontroversial.
engaged_works.summary: Swami Medhananda (Ayon Maharaj before sannyāsa) — Ramakrishna Mission scholar of Vedānta and comparative philosophy at the Ramakrishna Vivekananda University. His engaged-works are not single monographs but a multi-decade essay-and-monograph output on Sri Aurobindo, Sri Ramakrishna, Vivekānanda, and the comparative dialogue with continental phenomenology and analytic philosophy of religion. Key book-length: *Infinite Paths to Infinite Reality: Sri Ramakrishna and Cross-Cultural Philosophy of Religion* (Oxford UP, 2018); *Swami Vivekananda's Vedāntic Cosmopolitanism* (Oxford UP, 2020); editorial work on Aurobindo and Vedānta in *Sophia*, *International Journal of Hindu Studies*, and similar venues. This work-entry is a deliberate bundle pending v3 splitting into individual monograph entries when the corpus expands Medhananda's coverage. Source_status reflects that the full bibliographic disambiguation is deferred.
